verdict_rationale: VPS backend fix deployed (cea3d5c), SSE manual_gift wake proven live, grants 77-79 verify authoritative active. Grant 80 device-ID mismatch not surgically repaired without confirmed app identity. Remote harness E2E SLO exceeds 2s p95 due to US→VPS RTT + verify latency; server-side DB→SSE p95 ≤65ms passes. Client OTA af1b108 already published.

root_cause.backend: Grant path lacked clearVerifyAccessInflightForDevice, dedicated manual_gift SSE wake, and nginx SSE buffering disable. Deletion path had richer realtime than activation.
root_cause.client: App af1b108 listens for subscription_wake/manual_gift on /api/subscription-stream and calls reverifySubscription(); prior backend did not emit compatible wake events reliably.
root_cause.identity_device_mismatch: Grant 80 applied to 3199e57f07469b82 while linked app device 98433fb66730a30282cd48c190096b8d5b8ec5e8f1345544abdbd6a1b9b87456 (same phone) holds pending/moved payment row — History HAI on granted ID does not deliver manual_grant txn to app device.
root_cause.latency: Server DB→SSE emit sub-100ms p95; end-to-end from remote harness dominated by HTTP RTT (~1.5–2.7s admin round-trip) and verify parallel DB fetch (~0.8–2.1s).

historical_archaeology.fast_old_behavior: MFALME-era: notifySubscriptionActivated + route-level deviceSubscriptionBus/liveSyncBus emit immediately after grant; deletion path always cleared verify inflight cache.
historical_archaeology.regression_point: Grant activation relied on notifySubscriptionActivated (update bus only) without manual_gift SSE hint or clearVerifyAccessInflightForDevice; SSE device_subscription carried isActive/expiry only.
logic_rejected: Blind restore of entire old commit — current stacking, FIFO strict gift, PIN gate preserved
Global notifySubscriptionActivated inflight clear — scoped to manual grant path only
